calculate_frequencies(S) ->
    % S is expected to be a list of characters.
    lists:foldl(fun(Acc, Char) ->
        case maps:get(Char, Acc) of
            {Count, _} -> maps:put(Char, {Count + 1, Char}, Acc);
            _ -> maps:put(Char, {1, Char}, Acc)
        end
    end, #{}, S).

is_lower_letter(C) ->
    C >= 'a' and C =< 'z';
is_lower_letter(_C) ->
    false.

is_digit(C) ->
    C >= '0' and C =< '9';
is_digit(_C) ->
    false.

mirror(C) ->
    case {is_lower_letter(C), is_digit(C)} of
        {true, _} ->
            % Letter mirroring
            Pos = char_to_int(C) - char_to_int('a'),
            NewPos = 25 - Pos,
            char_from_int(char_to_int('a') + NewPos);
        {false, true} ->
            % Digit mirroring
            Val = char_to_int(C) - char_to_int('0'),
            NewVal = 9 - Val,
            char_from_int(char_to_int('0') + NewVal);
        _ ->

calculate_sum_of_diffs([], _Frequencies, _ProcessedPairs) -> 0.

    case maps:find(C, Frequencies) of
        {ok, FreqC} ->
            M = mirror(C),
            
            % Canonical pair key: {min_char, max_char}
            PairKey = {min(C, M), max(C, M)},

                    Difference = abs(FreqC - FreqM),

            % Should not happen if C comes from maps:keys(Frequencies)

is_letter(Byte) when Byte >= 97 and Byte =< 122.

%% Helper function to determine if a byte value is a digit
is_digit(Byte) when Byte >= 48 and Byte =< 57.

%% Helper function to calculate the mirror byte value

    case is_letter(Byte) of
        true ->
            % Lowercase letters: 'a' (97) to 'z' (122). Range size 26.

    MirrorIndex = 9 - (ord(C) - ord('0')),
    chr(ord('0') + MirrorIndex);
mirror(C) ->
    % Should not happen based on problem constraints
    C.

%% Helper function to get frequency of a character from the frequency list
%% FreqList is an association list [{Char, Count} | ...]
get_freq(C, FreqList) ->
    case lists:member(C-Freq, FreqList) of
        true -> Freq;
        false -> 0
    end.

%% Main solving function
solve(String) ->
    % 1. Calculate frequencies
    FreqList = lists:foldl(fun(Acc, Char) ->
        case lists:member(Char-Freq, Acc) of
            true -> lists:update(Acc, Char, fun(_-F) -> F + 1 end);
            false -> [Char-1 | Acc]
        end
    end, [], String),

    % 2. Calculate the total absolute difference sum
    TotalDiff = lists:foldl(fun(Acc, [C, _]) ->
        % We process the unique characters in the FreqList
        case lists:member(C-FreqC, FreqList) of
            true ->
                M = mirror(C),
                % To count pairs exactly once, we only process if C <= M lexicographically
                if C =< M ->
                    FreqM = get_freq(M, FreqList),
                    Diff = abs(FreqC - FreqM),
                    Acc + Diff;
                true ->
                    Acc
                end
            false ->
                Acc
        end
    end, 0, FreqList).

    TotalDiff.
